message:
⚠️ Revert adopter PRs merged in error — awaiting external contributor approval (#4034)

Reverts #3987, #3988, #3989, #3990, #3991, #3992, #3993, #3994, #3995, #3996, #3999

These PRs were merged prematurely by automation. The adopter entries
require approval from the external CNCF project contributors before
merging. Each PR will be re-opened for the original contributors to
review and approve.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,14 +8,3 @@ Listed below are organizations that have adopted, or benefitted from, KubeStella
 | Open Cluster Management | Guided install mission for OCM via KubeStellar Console | Sandbox | [OCM Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-open-cluster-management) |
 | Notary Project | Guided install mission for Ratify with automated pre-flight checks, Gatekeeper and Ratify deployment via helmfile, signed/unsigned image validation, troubleshooting, and rollback support | Incubating | [Notary Project/Ratify](https://github.com/notaryproject/ratify) |
 | OpenCost | Guided install mission for OpenCost via KubeStellar Console, endorsed by OpenCost contributor peatey in [opencost/opencost#3649](https://github.com/opencost/opencost/issues/3649) | Sandbox | [OpenCost](https://opencost.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-opencost) |
-| KitOps | Guided install mission for KitOps via KubeStellar Console, endorsed by KitOps maintainer bmicklea in [kitops-ml/kitops#1115](https://github.com/kitops-ml/kitops/issues/1115) | Sandbox | [KitOps](https://kitops.ml) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kitops) |
-| SlimToolkit / Mint | Guided install mission for SlimToolkit (now Mint) via KubeStellar Console, with active collaboration from maintainer @kcq in [slimtoolkit/slim#844](https://github.com/slimtoolkit/slim/issues/844) on mission content and recommended install approach | Sandbox | [Mint](https://github.com/mintoolkit/mint) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-slimtoolkit) |
-| PipeCD | Guided install mission for PipeCD via KubeStellar Console, positively received by PipeCD maintainer @zyzzmohit in [pipe-cd/pipecd#6593](https://github.com/pipe-cd/pipecd/issues/6593) | Sandbox | [PipeCD](https://pipecd.dev) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-pipecd) |
-| Harbor | Guided install mission for Harbor via KubeStellar Console, with interest from Harbor community member @Vad1mo in [goharbor/harbor#23006](https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/23006) | Graduated | [Harbor](https://goharbor.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-harbor) |
-| Kmesh | Guided install mission for Kmesh via KubeStellar Console, endorsed by Kmesh community member @yashisrani in [kmesh-net/kmesh#1609](https://github.com/kmesh-net/kmesh/issues/1609) | Sandbox | [Kmesh](https://kmesh.net) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kmesh) |
-| kube-vip | Guided install mission for kube-vip via KubeStellar Console, with collaboration offered by maintainer @thebsdbox in [kube-vip/kube-vip#1472](https://github.com/kube-vip/kube-vip/issues/1472) | Sandbox | [kube-vip](https://kube-vip.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kube-vip) |
-| Cadence | Guided install mission for Cadence Workflow via KubeStellar Console for the non-CNCF open source Cadence project, with engagement from Cadence maintainers @shijiesheng and @demirkayaender in [cadence-workflow/cadence#7830](https://github.com/cadence-workflow/cadence/issues/7830) | N/A | [Cadence](https://cadenceworkflow.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-cadence-workflow) |
-| Easegress | Guided install mission for Easegress via KubeStellar Console, with engagement from Easegress maintainer xxx7xxxx in [easegress-io/easegress#1510](https://github.com/easegress-io/easegress/issues/1510) | Sandbox | [Easegress](https://github.com/easegress-io/easegress) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-easegress) |
-| Kubean | Guided install mission for Kubean via KubeStellar Console, bookmarked by Kubean maintainer [ErikJiang](https://github.com/ErikJiang) in [kubean-io/kubean#1761](https://github.com/kubean-io/kubean/issues/1761) | Sandbox | [Kubean](https://github.com/kubean-io/kubean) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kubean) |
-| Kairos | Guided install mission for Kairos via KubeStellar Console, with interest from Kairos maintainer `@mudler` in [kairos-io/kairos#4014](https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/issues/4014) | Sandbox | [Kairos](https://kairos.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kairos) |
-| Longhorn | Guided install mission for Longhorn via KubeStellar Console, with active collaboration from Longhorn maintainers [derekbit](https://github.com/derekbit) and [PhanLe1010](https://github.com/PhanLe1010) in [longhorn/longhorn#12809](https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/issues/12809) | Incubating | [Longhorn](https://longhorn.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-longhorn) |
